name: uderia-shell
description: Command execution in an isolated Docker container. Every invocation runs in a fresh throwaway container — no host filesystem access, no host network. Requires Docker on the Uderia host.

DOCKER_IMAGE.label: Docker image
DOCKER_IMAGE.description: Container image to use for command execution.

ALLOWED_COMMANDS.label: Allowed commands
ALLOWED_COMMANDS.description: Comma-separated allowlist of command prefixes (e.g. python,pip,ls). Leave empty to allow any command (not recommended).

MOUNT_PATHS.label: Mount paths
MOUNT_PATHS.description: Comma-separated host:container path pairs to mount into the container (e.g. /data/reports:/data). Empty = no mounts.

security_acknowledgment_text: uderia-shell executes commands on the Uderia server inside an isolated Docker container. Docker must be installed on the host. All executions are audit-logged. By enabling this server you accept responsibility for access governance.
